title: We Belong Together
overview: A recovering alcoholic college professor trying to put his life back together meets a seductive new student. She offers him a sensual escape from reality until he realizes she may be insane.

trailers.title: Draya Michele Plays An Obsessed Student In BET's Original Movie "We Belong Together"
